title: Add accessible admin login entry point

requirements.summary: Add a discreet navigation link to /admin in the footer so admins can access the login page from the production site
acceptanceCriteria: A link or button to /admin is accessible from the main page on the production site
Navigating to /admin shows the AdminLoginForm (password gate) via ProtectedAdminRoute
The link is unobtrusive (e.g., small text in footer) so it does not distract customers
Unauthenticated users who visit /admin see the login form, not the admin dashboard

file_operations.description: Add a small, styled 'Admin' link in the footer component that navigates to /admin. Style it to be subtle (smaller text, muted color) so it blends with the footer without drawing customer attention. The link should use React Router's Link component for client-side navigation.
